summary: Market mixed on Apr 29: S&P 500 -0.12%, Nasdaq -0.15%, Dow -0.58%, Russell 2000 -0.62%. Market awaiting Mag-7 earnings and Fed decision. Oil prices rising on WSJ report of Trump preparing Iran blockade. S&P 500 previously hit record 7,173.91. IT, comm services, consumer discretionary top April performers; energy negative due to US-Iran conflict.
